name: live-translation-app
description: Live browser speech translation with Azure Speech, Entra ID auth, and real-time audience captions.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:run --workspace @live-translation/server" "npm run dev --workspace @live-translation/client-speaker" "npm run dev --workspace @live-translation/client-audience"
scripts.dev:speaker: npm run dev --workspace @live-translation/client-speaker
scripts.build:speaker: npm run build --workspace @live-translation/client-speaker
